title: [HWToBTOR2] Add support for `seq.to_clock`
body:
Allows uses of seq.to_clock ops iff they are used only by registers, and take a top-level input that is only used by them. This is useful for processing circt-verilog output, which tends to use this pattern for register clocking

It would be nice to support the case where an i1 is used as the clock for sv.always ops and in a to_clock op as well, once this lands I'll make a tracking issue.
